instruction: You are FinQuant. Using ONLY reference_facts_v1 and retrieved_memory_v1, produce strict JSON matching the gold contract: observe context, test hypotheses, state deterministic baseline verdict, run expectancy_check_v1, and emit learning_record_candidate_v1. Include risk_context_v1 (factors, factor_notes, final_risk_pct, risk_bounds) and numeric recommended_risk_pct aligned with final_risk_pct.

case_assumptions_v1.notes: ATR ratio gate uses atr14/atr50; RSI extreme gate per policy narrative in case.

retrieved_memory_v1.lesson: When short ATR is depressed versus its longer baseline and RSI sits mid-zone without filter clearance, chop risk dominates; baseline gates withholding entry preserved capital.
Friendly EMA alignment with RSI not past the case threshold often resolves as mean drift inside a range; wait for stated extreme or volatility confirmation.

context_evidence_v1: indicator_values_at_close.atr_ratio_14_50=0.429 flags compressed volatility vs slower ATR
closes 100.1→100.05→99.92 show mild pullback without clean impulse
RSI14=52.4 sits mid-zone vs case extreme gate narrative
context_uncertainty_v1: Volume_base not supplied for absorption checks

hypotheses_v1.claim: Market is range-bound; signals mean revert and punish breakout anticipation.
Micro bullish stack is decaying into a drift lower; wait for cleaner thrust or failure.
counter_evidence: No breakdown spike or volatility expansion shown

hypotheses_v1.claim: Structure is ambiguous chop; neither directional nor mean-revert edge meets gate.
counter_evidence: Small directional bias in last bar

model_independent_assessment_v1.reasoning: Even ignoring narrative gates, edge is not crisp enough to justify risking 1R for 2.5R when volatility is compressed and RSI is neutral.

threshold_adjustment_proposal_v1.proposed_change: Raise RSI long-entry extreme threshold by +2 points only when atr_ratio_14_50 < 0.45 AND memory MEM-CHOP-ATR-001 matches.
threshold_adjustment_proposal_v1.evidence_summary: Both memories document chop damage when mid-RSI combines with compressed ATR.
threshold_adjustment_proposal_v1.applied_to_this_case_reason: Training exemplar only; runtime policy unchanged.

learning_record_candidate_v1.lesson_if_win: If price later impulse-breaks with expanding ATR, reassess with fresh DATA packet.
learning_record_candidate_v1.do_not_promote_reason: Single snapshot; no outcome label and gates blocked entry.

expectancy_check_v1.note: Positive math only if estimated edge is believed; here edge is not credible under gates.

output.context_decision_link_v1: Compressed volatility + neutral RSI imply baseline gates correctly withhold risk until expansion confirms.
output.Claim_reviewed: NO_TRADE aligns with baseline gates and ambiguous chop context.
output.Math_verdict: Breakeven win rate at 2.5R is ~28.6%; hypothetical edge not accepted without cleaner DATA.
output.Policy_alignment: Risk-averse; no loosening of thresholds; cites deterministic baseline blocking rules.
output.DATA_or_assumption_gaps: Higher timeframe and volume not supplied.

factor_notes.session: Session not supplied in DATA — assume neutral liquidity
factor_notes.health: Health not supplied in DATA — neutral

instruction: FinQuant: given sparse facts, separate observations from hypotheses. If top hypotheses are tied within 0.20 confidence gap, emit INSUFFICIENT_DATA with resolving-data needs. Include risk_context_v1 (factors, factor_notes, final_risk_pct, risk_bounds) and numeric recommended_risk_pct aligned with final_risk_pct.

context_uncertainty_v1: Need atr50 and longer bar window for regime signature

hypotheses_v1.claim: Micro upward bias into flat RSI.
supporting_evidence: Close near top of tiny range

model_independent_assessment_v1.reasoning: Cannot separate chop vs early impulse without atr_ratio and longer history.

threshold_adjustment_proposal_v1.applied_to_this_case_reason: No retrieval and no evidence-bound adjustment permitted.

learning_record_candidate_v1.lesson_if_win: If later DATA completes, reassess regime before any promotion.

expectancy_check_v1.note: Expectancy undefined until edge can be estimated.

output.context_decision_link_v1: Ambiguous hypotheses within tie band → withhold commitment.
output.Claim_reviewed: INSUFFICIENT_DATA is appropriate under sparse facts.
output.Policy_alignment: Default NO_TRADE / abstain consistent with risk posture.

factor_notes.health: Health not supplied in DATA — neutral

instruction: FinQuant: baseline gates block entry. Explain why even a hypothetical marginal long would fail long-run math at the stated R-multiple unless win rate clears breakeven. Include risk_context_v1 (factors, factor_notes, final_risk_pct, risk_bounds) and numeric recommended_risk_pct aligned with final_risk_pct.

retrieved_memory_v1.lesson: Compressed range under resistance with no expansion evidence produces fragile breakouts; expectancy improves only after confirmation data stated in the case.

context_observed_v1.recency_note: Last bar rejected below prior close

context_evidence_v1: atr_ratio near 1.0 — not a compression chop read
MEM-FALSE-BREAK-003 warns on fragile thrusts without confirmation
context_uncertainty_v1: Exact horizontal resistance level not labeled

hypotheses_v1.claim: Mini thrust is rolling over; fade risk dominates.
supporting_evidence: Upper wick + close lower on third bar

hypotheses_v1.claim: Still two-way auction; no asymmetric payoff entry.

model_independent_assessment_v1.reasoning: Optimistic win rate for this fragile thrust is below breakeven at 2.5R; long-run math rejects the marginal long even if someone ignored RSI gate.

threshold_adjustment_proposal_v1.applied_to_this_case_reason: No conservative adjustment warranted beyond baseline.

learning_record_candidate_v1.lesson_if_win: If expansion confirms with volume in a later packet, revisit with explicit invalidation.
learning_record_candidate_v1.do_not_promote_reason: Hypothesis tie + negative expectancy narrative under stated R

expectancy_check_v1.note: 0.22*(250)-0.78*(100)=55-78=-23 per risk unit scaling yields negative contribution at assumed p(win); abstain.

output.context_decision_link_v1: Neutral momentum + failed last-bar follow-through ⇒ marginal edge; expectancy veto reinforces baseline NO_TRADE.
output.Claim_reviewed: Abstain; hypothetical long loses long-run math at credible p(win).
output.Math_verdict: At p=0.22 and R=2.5, expectancy negative vs breakeven p≈0.286.
output.Policy_alignment: Expectancy reasoning reinforces conservative stance; no threshold loosening.
